abilities.name: Demise (Last Blow)
abilities.text: Once per turn. When this model is killed, it may discard a card. If it does so, it heals 2, then deals 2 damage to an enemy within 1" (if able).

abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Unexpected Reserves
abilities.text: While this model has half or less of its maximum health, it may add any one suit to each of its duel totals.

actions.name: Arc Axes
actions.effects: The target gains a Slow token.

triggers.name: Devastating Strike
triggers.text: When resolving, reduce this action's raise value to 3.

triggers.name: Arc
triggers.text: Once per activation. Declare this action again targeting a different model, drawing range and LoS from the original target.

actions.name: Tag Out
actions.effects: Place this model anywhere within 1" of a model engaging the target, then place the target anywhere within 3" of its current location. If this action receives a raise, this model may declare a (melee) action.

triggers.name: "I'll Hold Them Off!"
triggers.text: Enemies within (aura)1" gain a Staggered token. If the target has not activated this turn, it may do so.
